mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_config WHERE chat_id = #{chatId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM chat_config WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_config ( chat_id, title, type, enabled, filter_type, auto_delete_after_hours, file_name_template, download_path, remote_path, upload_after_download, notify_after_download, forward_to_chat_id, extra_data, username, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{chatId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{enabled}, #{filterType}, #{autoDeleteAfterHours}, #{fileNameTemplate}, #{downloadPath}, #{remotePath}, #{uploadAfterDownload}, #{notifyAfterDownload}, #{forwardToChatId}, #{extraData}, #{username}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_config SET chat_id = #{chatId}, title = #{title}, type = #{type}, enabled = #{enabled}, filter_type = #{filterType}, auto_delete_after_hours = #{autoDeleteAfterHours}, file_name_template = #{fileNameTemplate}, download_path = #{downloadPath}, remote_path = #{remotePath}, upload_after_download = #{uploadAfterDownload}, notify_after_download = #{notifyAfterDownload}, forward_to_chat_id = #{forwardToChatId}, extra_data = #{extraData}, username = #{username}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
